productDisplayName: Nike Men T90 Strike IV Hg-B Grey Sports Shoes
description: Built for speed on hard surfaces, the nike T90 Strike 1V HG lightweight soccer cleats are designed for that revolutionary speed, coupled with the ultimate in traction, cushioning and control. The entire shoe is designed such that it mirrors the shape of the foot and offers a premium Fit allowing you to strike the ball fast and clear. The shoe is configured with firm ground (FG) cleats that can be used on short grass fields that may be slightly damp, but not muddy. This special shoe is engineered with an innovative stud design that enhances your speed and movement without added weight or pressure. UpperUltra-lightweight synthetic leather adjusts to the foot shape and works to keep feet locked in placeAsymmetric lace-ups for a snug fitContoured speed last for an ergonomic fitContrast branding and bold overlays for enhanced style and durabilityCushioning at the heel provides a more comfortable feel and helps keep the heel from slippingMidsoleContoured sock-liner at the midsole for cushioning to reduce stud pressureOutsoleGlass-fibre out-sole engineered for responsiveness and explosive bursts of speed while ensuring excellent tractionFirm, yet flexible out-sole that helps reduce stud pressureSoft-ground (SG) studs for use on wet and muddy fields that require maximum tractionShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
